web.title: Family Birth Center at Tacoma General Hospital - MultiCare
web.description: To pre-register for your upcoming hospital stay, call 253-792-6005 on Monday through Friday between 8am and 6:30pm. Enhancing communication, improving outcomes.

web.title: MultiCare Tacoma General Hospital
web.description: Located in 315 Martin Luther King Jr Way in Tacoma, WA. Open 24 hours every day. For more information, call 253-403-1000.

web.title: Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU) - Mary Bridge Children's Hospital
web.description: Mary Bridge Children's operates the only Level IV Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU) in southwest Washington.
